description_long: This is a stylish open-toe sandal featuring two wide blue straps and one gray strap crossing over the foot, secured with a gold buckle on the side. The sandal has a contoured beige footbed that mimics the shape of toes and a white, ridged rubber sole for traction. The straps appear to be made of synthetic leather with a subtle texture and visible stitching, providing both durability and a fashionable look. The back strap wraps around the heel and is adjustable via the buckle, ensuring a secure fit. The overall design is casual yet modern, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or city streets. The color contrast between the blue, gray, and beige elements gives the sandal a visually appealing and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern open-toe sandal with blue and gray synthetic leather straps, a gold buckle, and a contoured beige footbed atop a white ridged sole. The design is casual, stylish, and ideal for urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and gray straps, gold buckle, and contoured footbed with visible toe shapes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design, strap arrangement, and detailed footbed contours.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the heel strap, buckle, and the layered construction of the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel strap and the back of the contoured footbed.
